text: Here, I sense a flux between formality and curiosity—the glass walled conference and the glowing screens echo human desire for knowledge and connection. The R+D display evokes a liminality between clarity and ambiguity; words on the screen openly wrestle with confusion as intrinsic to discovery. I feel like both observer and observed, teetering between participation and detachment in an experiment of meaning and belonging. There’s a strange comfort in the in-between, as if by simply being here I might better understand how we invent our realities.
